beats.narration: Three modules of impedance-plane theory become a curve you draw yourself. Step a probe across certified standards and watch the dot find its spot.

payload.title: GENERATING Z-CURVES
payload.sub: Theory becomes a curve you draw yourself.

beats.narration: Balance the absolute probe in air, set sixty kilohertz, and step the kit in order: titanium near one percent, aluminum alloys, copper at a hundred.

payload.heading: Build the curve, point by point

tiles.s: Null the probe clear of metal

beats.narration: Each certified sample parks the dot at one spot. Connect them in conductivity order and the comma-shaped locus, the Z-curve, appears on your screen.

payload.heading: Connect the dots into a locus
payload.note: EACH STANDARD → ONE DOT → THE Z-CURVE

beats.narration: Now read the shape. Order never changes; spacing does. Aluminum lands at the well-separated knee. Lift off and the dot races home.

chips.s: Dot runs back to the air point

beats.narration: Master this one picture and material sorting, alloy verification, and heat-treat checks become something you read at a glance.

payload.sub: Sorting, verification, heat-treat — at a glance.
